meta.description: Regression: UniCredit 'Other - DISPOSAL TO PAY OUT TAXES' pattern. Parser must recognise English-only 'Other -' prefix and DISPOSAL+tax keyword. Was misclassified as direction=unknown/undetermined before PARSER_VERSION 1.2.1.
